overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt exploring the palace gardens of Beauclair. The character traverses wildflower meadows, vineyard corridors, and formal garden terraces with gothic stone architecture overlooking the harbor city.

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and wildflowers toward a large tree with a scenic view of the harbor city

entered.detail: massive olive tree with thick trunk and spreading branches in the center of the meadow
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the hill
distant view of the harbor city with red rooftops and towers
gothic stone archway ruins of the palace structure
lush grass with scattered purple, red, and yellow wildflowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a lush wildflower meadow on a sunny hillside. A large olive tree dominates the center while the distant harbor city of Beauclair and gothic palace ruins frame the view to the sides.

events.description: transitions from wild meadow to cultivated garden terraces with stone walls and trimmed hedges

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path past garden workers tending to the terraces

notable_agents.action: noblewoman in red dress walking along the path toward Geralt
worker kneeling and tending to plants beside the path

entered.detail: low stone wall lining the left side of the garden path
worn dirt path through the garden terraces
manicured green hedges along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a cultivated garden terrace with stone walls and trimmed hedges. Geralt passes a noblewoman in a red dress and workers tending the gardens, with the city view still visible in the background.

events.description: enters narrow vineyard corridor with rows of grapevines on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking briskly between rows of grapevines toward the stone archway at the end

notable_agents.action: worker with yellow hat tending to vines at the edge of the row

entered.detail: tall grapevines forming narrow corridors on both sides of the path
gothic stone archway marking the exit of the vineyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through a narrow corridor formed by tall grapevines in the palace vineyard. The path leads toward a distant gothic stone archway, with a single worker visible tending to the plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal palace garden with paved courtyard and flower beds

events.description: exits vineyard through archway into open formal garden with stone paving and purple flowers
Geralt pauses and turns to survey the garden surroundings and architecture

agents.ego_description: walking through the formal garden, pausing to look around at the architecture and colorful flower beds

notable_agents.action: woman in green and gold dress walking through the garden
child running along the stone path ahead

entered.detail: ornate stone tile paving in the formal garden area
large blooming purple lilac bushes lining the path
white flowering shrubs in the foreground
second gothic stone archway at the far end of the garden

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the vineyard, Geralt enters a sunlit formal garden with ornate stone paving and vibrant purple flower bushes. He pauses to look around, observing the gothic architecture and other pedestrians enjoying the gardens.

events.description: passes through the gothic stone archway into a shaded tree-lined path

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway and continuing up the shaded path into the tree-lined area

entered.detail: tree-shaded stone path beyond the archway with dense foliage

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the gothic stone archway into a shaded, tree-lined path. The bright formal garden gives way to a cooler, enclosed walkway as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wild, sun-drenched hillside into the structured elegance of the palace gardens and finally into a shaded walkway. It begins with Geralt traversing a lush wildflower meadow dominated by a large olive tree, with the harbor city of Beauclair and gothic ruins framing the distant horizon. As he moves forward, the wild terrain shifts into a cultivated garden terrace where he passes a noblewoman in red and garden workers amidst trimmed hedges and stone walls. The scene then narrows into a corridor of tall grapevines within the palace vineyard before opening up again into a sunlit formal garden featuring ornate stone paving and vibrant purple flower bushes. Finally, the camera follows Geralt through a gothic stone archway, where the bright openness of the garden gives way to a cooler, enclosed, and tree-lined path.
